## ⚠️ ✨ Feature Requests

Thank you for your interest in improving this project! 🙌

⚠️ We don’t handle feature requests in this issue tracker.

👉 Please share your idea here instead:  
**[Submit your feedback (EN)](https://feedback.userreport.com/5f64b035-33e5-4e71-9572-dc9d1d451c18/)**  
**[Soumettre une demande (FR)](https://feedback.userreport.com/d6b0e711-0c77-459c-9d06-79f92264f221/)**

Thanks for your understanding 💙
